prompt: Edit image 1: Apply the winking facial expression from the character in image 2 to the main subject. Give this game screenshot character a playful, Lara Croft-inspired wink.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1: Modify the facial expression of the central male character with a bald head and tattoos. Apply a winking expression to his face, specifically closing his right eye and adding a subtle, playful smirk, replicating the style and charm of the winking character in image 2.
objects: Bald head of the male character
Male character with a winking expression
Right eye of the male character closed
Subtle, playful smirk on the male character's face
Grey/blue hoodie on the male character
